title: Glitter Christmas Window Stickers – Assorted Designs, Reusable PVC Snowflake & Festive Characters, Easy Apply & Remove, Large Sticker Sheet 59.5 x 21 cm
features: Assorted Festive Designs: Snowflakes, Snowmen, Reindeer And More For A Magical Winter Window Display
Easy Apply & Remove: Sticks Smoothly To Clean Glass And Peels Off Without Mess Or Residue
Reusable Year After Year: Store Flat And Reapply Each Season For Cost-Effective Christmas Décor
Large Sheet Size: Each Pack Includes One Assorted Sticker Sheet Measuring 59.5cm x 21cm x 0.2cm
Durable PVC With Glitter Finish: Sparkly Detail Catches The Light For A Bright, Family-Friendly Christmas Look
description: Product description Bring instant festive sparkle to your home or shop window. These Glitter Christmas Window Stickers come in assorted designs featuring snowflakes and classic holiday characters. They apply easily to clean glass, peel off without residue, and can be reused year after year—perfect for creating a magical winter scene in minutes. Assorted Designs: Snowflakes, snowmen, reindeer and more for a charming seasonal display. Easy Application: Simply place on clean glass, mirrors, patio doors or shop fronts. Reusable: Remove carefully and store flat to enjoy again every Christmas. Sparkly Finish: Glitter detailing adds eye-catching shine day and night. Generous Size: One assorted sheet included – 59.5cm x 21cm x 0.2cm . Specifications Product Glitter Christmas Window Stickers Design Assorted (Snowflakes & Festive Characters) Material PVC With Glitter Embellishments Packaged Dimensions 59.5cm x 21cm x 0.2cm Use Apply To Clean Glass; Remove And Reuse Ideal for homes, offices and retail windows—create a cosy, winter wonderland in moments. Safety Warning KEEP AWAY FROM DIRECT HEAT
